# Agentic Commerce — contraco

> Research and frameworks for enterprise visibility in an economy where AI agents are the buyers. By Frank Meltke of contraco.

agentic.contraco.net is contraco's research hub for agentic commerce: the shift from human-driven purchasing to autonomous AI agent-driven transactions at the API layer.

## Key Pages

- [Agentic Exposure Audit](https://agentic.contraco.net/)
- [How Agents Pay](https://agentic.contraco.net/how-agents-pay.html)
- [West vs East](https://agentic.contraco.net/west-vs-east.html)
- [Value Capture](https://agentic.contraco.net/value-capture.html)

## About

contraco is a premium transformation consultancy founded in 1998 by Frank Meltke. The Agentic Exposure Audit is contraco's diagnostic tool for enterprise readiness in agentic commerce.

- [contraco.net](https://contraco.net)
- [Frank Meltke](https://meltke.com)
- [Practitioner Notes](https://signal.meltke.com)
